T1: (AB: L) Subject: CarBahn's wholesale checkout

Hi Steve,

You sell CarBahn performance parts through a dealer and shop network, so terms at wholesale checkout are a real part of the operation. In TermStack that runs as a rule at checkout: new dealers pay now, approved dealers get Net 30, volume dealers over $5k get Net 60 with a 25% deposit, all applied automatically. A US toy and gift wholesaler on Plus runs it today.

When a shop places a wholesale order now, do dealer terms apply automatically at checkout, or are they handled through manual invoicing after the order?

Rajat
Founder, TermStack by Varr Labs
